title: Who We Are
description:
Who We Are
                          Soma General Traders is a diversified company operating across Tanzania and the Eastern Africa region, providing general trading, logistics support, distribution, and allied business services.
                          We serve a wide range of clients including corporates, institutions, NGOs, government entities, and private businesses — offering reliable solutions that support the procurement, supply, movement, and management of goods and services. With a strong operational foundation, industry knowledge, and a customer-focused approach, we deliver compliant and cost-effective solutions that support regional trade and business growth.
                          Explore Our Services
